---
title: "Quickstart"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Quickstart}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
if (requireNamespace("pkgload", quietly = TRUE)) {
  pkgload::load_all(quiet = TRUE, helpers = FALSE)
} else {
  library(DPmixGPD)
}
library(nimble)

# Make package helpers available even when the namespace is only loaded
build_nimble_bundle <- getFromNamespace("build_nimble_bundle", "DPmixGPD")
run_mcmc_bundle_manual <- getFromNamespace("run_mcmc_bundle_manual", "DPmixGPD")
predict <- stats::predict

# Locate datasets when pkgdown builds without installing the package
resolve_data_file <- function(filename) {
  candidates <- c(
    file.path("data", filename),
    file.path("..", "data", filename),
    file.path("..", "..", "data", filename)
  )
  existing <- candidates[file.exists(candidates)]
  if (length(existing) == 0) stop(sprintf("Data file %s not found", filename))
  existing[[1]]
}

# Helper functions
print_dataset_header <- function(data, name = deparse(substitute(data))) {
  cat(sprintf("Dataset: %s (n=%d", name, length(data$y)))
  if (!is.null(data$X)) cat(sprintf(", p=%d", ncol(data$X)))
  cat(")\n")
  invisible(NULL)
}

default_mcmc <- function() {
  list(niter = 1000, nburnin = 500, nchains = 2, thin = 1, seed = 1)
}
```

## Bulk-only fit

```{r bulk-data-load}
load(resolve_data_file("nc_pos200_k3.rda"), envir = environment())
print_dataset_header(nc_pos200_k3, "nc_pos200_k3")
```

```{r bulk-model-spec}
mcmc <- default_mcmc()
bundle <- build_nimble_bundle(
  y = nc_pos200_k3$y,
  backend = "sb",
  kernel = "gamma",
  GPD = FALSE,
  components = nc_pos200_k3$meta$K_true,
  mcmc = mcmc
)
summary(bundle)
```

```{r bulk-fit-mcmc, eval=TRUE}
fit <- run_mcmc_bundle_manual(bundle, show_progress = FALSE)
```

```{r bulk-s3-summary, eval=TRUE}
summary(fit)
```

## Tail-designed fit

```{r tail-data-load}
load(resolve_data_file("nc_pos_tail200_k4.rda"), envir = environment())
print_dataset_header(nc_pos_tail200_k4, "nc_pos_tail200_k4")
```

```{r tail-model-spec}
mcmc <- default_mcmc()
bundle_tail <- build_nimble_bundle(
  y = nc_pos_tail200_k4$y,
  backend = "sb",
  kernel = "lognormal",
  GPD = TRUE,
  components = nc_pos_tail200_k4$meta$K_true,
  mcmc = mcmc
)
summary(bundle_tail)
```

```{r tail-fit-mcmc, eval=TRUE}
fit_tail <- run_mcmc_bundle_manual(bundle_tail, show_progress = FALSE)
```

```{r tail-s3-summary, eval=TRUE}
summary(fit_tail)
```

## Prediction example (20% new data)

```{r pred-data-load}
load(resolve_data_file("nc_posX100_p3_k2.rda"), envir = environment())
print_dataset_header(nc_posX100_p3_k2, "nc_posX100_p3_k2")
```

```{r pred-data-setup}
X <- nc_posX100_p3_k2$X
n_new <- ceiling(0.2 * nrow(X))
newdata <- X[seq_len(n_new), , drop = FALSE]
```

```{r pred-model-spec}
mcmc <- default_mcmc()
bundle_x <- build_nimble_bundle(
  y = nc_posX100_p3_k2$y,
  X = X,
  backend = "sb",
  kernel = "gamma",
  GPD = FALSE,
  components = nc_posX100_p3_k2$meta$K_true,
  mcmc = mcmc
)
```

```{r pred-fit-mcmc, eval=TRUE}
fit_x <- run_mcmc_bundle_manual(bundle_x, show_progress = FALSE)
```

```{r pred-s3-methods, eval=TRUE}
predict(fit_x, newdata = newdata, type = "quantile", p = c(0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 0.9))
```
